verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Woe to every scorner and mocker
verse.verse_2: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
verse.verse_3: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.
verse.verse_4: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
verse.verse_5: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
verse.verse_6: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,
verse.verse_7: Which mounts directed at the hearts.
verse.verse_8: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
